revision.comment: Bot: create Islamic-calendar day stub
revision.text:
Safar 10 is the 10 day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 10 day of the month [[Safar]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]]
[[Category:Arabic Calendar Days]] [[ab:1]] [[af:1]] [[als:1]] [[am:1 እ.ኤ.አ.]] [[an:1]] [[ar:1 م]] [[arc:1]] [[ast:1]] [[av:1 сон]] [[avk:1]] [[az:1]] [[azb:۱ (میلادی)]] [[ban:1 M]] [[bar:1]] [[bat_smg:1]] [[bcl:1]] [[be:1]] [[be_x_old:1]] [[bg:1]] [[bjn:1]] [[bn:১]] [[bpy:মারি ১]] [[br:1]] [[bs:1.]] [[bxr:1 жэл]] [[ca:1]] [[cdo:1 nièng]] [[ceb:1]] [[ckb:١]] [[commons:1]] [[crh:1]] [[cs:1]] [[cv:1 çул]] [[cy:1]] [[da:1]] [[de:1]] [[diq:1]] [[el:1]] [[eml:1]] [[enwikiq:1]] [[eo:1]] [[es:1]] [[et:1]] [[eu:1]] [[ext:1]] [[fa:۱ (میلادی)]] [[fi:1]] [[fo:1]] [[fr:1]] [[frp:1]] [[frr:1]] [[fur:1]] [[fy:1]] [[ga:1]] [[gan:1年]] [[gd:1]] [[gl:1]] [[gn:1]] [[gv:1]] [[he:1]] [[hi:१]] [[hr:1.]] [[ht:1 (almanak jilyen)]] [[hu:1]] [[hy:1]] [[ia:1]] [[id:1]] [[ig:1]] [[ilo:1]] [[inh:1 шу]] [[io:1]] [[is:1 (ár)]] [[it:1]] [[ja:1年]] [[jv:1]] [[ka:1]] [[kaa:1]] [[kk:1 жыл]] [[km:១]] [[ko:1년]] [[ku:1]] [[la:1]] [[lb:1]] [[lij:1]] [[lmo:1]] [[lt:1 m.]] [[lv:1. gads]] [[meta:Turkic Marathon 2020/Article Lists/Azerbaijan]] [[mg:1]] [[mhr:1]] [[min:1]] [[mk:1]] [[mr:इ.स. १]] [[mrj:1 и]] [[ms:1]] [[myv:1 ие]] [[mzn:۱ (میلادی)]] [[nah:1]] [[nap:1]] [[nds:1]] [[nds_nl:1]] [[new:सन् १]] [[nl:1]] [[nn:1]] [[no:1]] [[nrm:1]] [[nso:1]] [[oc:1]] [[os:1-æм аз]] [[pa:1 ਈਸਵੀ]] [[pi:१]] [[pl:1]] [[pnb:1ء]] [[pt:1]] [[qu:1]] [[ro:1]] [[ru:1 год]] [[rue:1 рік]] [[sa:१]] [[sah:1 сыл]] [[sco:1]] [[sd:1ع]] [[sh:1.]] [[shn:ဢေႇတီႇ 1]] [[si:1]] [[simple:1]] [[sk:1]] [[sl:1]] [[sq:1]] [[sr:1]] [[srn:1]] [[sv:1]] [[sw:1]] [[szl:1]] [[ta:1]] [[tg:Соли 1]] [[th:พ.ศ. 544]] [[tk:1]] [[tl:1 AD]] [[tly:1]] [[tr:1]] [[tt:1 ел]] [[uk:1]] [[ur:1ء]] [[uz:1]] [[uzwikiq:1]] [[vec:1]] [[vi:1]] [[vls:1]] [[vo:1]] [[wa:1]] [[war:1]] [[wuu:1年]] [[xal:1 җил]] [[xmf:1]] [[zh:1年]] [[zh_classical:元年]] [[zh_min_nan:1 nî]] [[zh_yue:1年]]

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
Safar 10 is the 10 day of the [[:en:Islamic calendar|Islamic calendar]]. It is the 10 day of the month [[Safar]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]]
[[Category:Arabic Calendar Days]] [[ab:1]] [[af:1]] [[als:1]] [[am:1 እ.ኤ.አ.]] [[an:1]] [[ar:1 م]] [[arc:1]] [[ast:1]] [[av:1 сон]] [[avk:1]] [[az:1]] [[azb:۱ (میلادی)]] [[ban:1 M]] [[bar:1]] [[bat_smg:1]] [[bcl:1]] [[be:1]] [[be_x_old:1]] [[bg:1]] [[bjn:1]] [[bn:১]] [[bpy:মারি ১]] [[br:1]] [[bs:1.]] [[bxr:1 жэл]] [[ca:1]] [[cdo:1 nièng]] [[ceb:1]] [[ckb:١]] [[commons:1]] [[crh:1]] [[cs:1]] [[cv:1 çул]] [[cy:1]] [[da:1]] [[de:1]] [[diq:1]] [[el:1]] [[eml:1]] [[enwikiq:1]] [[eo:1]] [[es:1]] [[et:1]] [[eu:1]] [[ext:1]] [[fa:۱ (میلادی)]] [[fi:1]] [[fo:1]] [[fr:1]] [[frp:1]] [[frr:1]] [[fur:1]] [[fy:1]] [[ga:1]] [[gan:1年]] [[gd:1]] [[gl:1]] [[gn:1]] [[gv:1]] [[he:1]] [[hi:१]] [[hr:1.]] [[ht:1 (almanak jilyen)]] [[hu:1]] [[hy:1]] [[ia:1]] [[id:1]] [[ig:1]] [[ilo:1]] [[inh:1 шу]] [[io:1]] [[is:1 (ár)]] [[it:1]] [[ja:1年]] [[jv:1]] [[ka:1]] [[kaa:1]] [[kk:1 жыл]] [[km:១]] [[ko:1년]] [[ku:1]] [[la:1]] [[lb:1]] [[lij:1]] [[lmo:1]] [[lt:1 m.]] [[lv:1. gads]] [[meta:Turkic Marathon 2020/Article Lists/Azerbaijan]] [[mg:1]] [[mhr:1]] [[min:1]] [[mk:1]] [[mr:इ.स. १]] [[mrj:1 и]] [[ms:1]] [[myv:1 ие]] [[mzn:۱ (میلادی)]] [[nah:1]] [[nap:1]] [[nds:1]] [[nds_nl:1]] [[new:सन् १]] [[nl:1]] [[nn:1]] [[no:1]] [[nrm:1]] [[nso:1]] [[oc:1]] [[os:1-æм аз]] [[pa:1 ਈਸਵੀ]] [[pi:१]] [[pl:1]] [[pnb:1ء]] [[pt:1]] [[qu:1]] [[ro:1]] [[ru:1 год]] [[rue:1 рік]] [[sa:१]] [[sah:1 сыл]] [[sco:1]] [[sd:1ع]] [[sh:1.]] [[shn:ဢေႇတီႇ 1]] [[si:1]] [[simple:1]] [[sk:1]] [[sl:1]] [[sq:1]] [[sr:1]] [[srn:1]] [[sv:1]] [[sw:1]] [[szl:1]] [[ta:1]] [[tg:Соли 1]] [[th:พ.ศ. 544]] [[tk:1]] [[tl:1 AD]] [[tly:1]] [[tr:1]] [[tt:1 ел]] [[uk:1]] [[ur:1ء]] [[uz:1]] [[uzwikiq:1]] [[vec:1]] [[vi:1]] [[vls:1]] [[vo:1]] [[wa:1]] [[war:1]] [[wuu:1年]] [[xal:1 җил]] [[xmf:1]] [[zh:1年]] [[zh_classical:元年]] [[zh_min_nan:1 nî]] [[zh_yue:1年]]

revision.comment: Bot: overwrite Islamic-day stub
revision.text:
{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Safar 10''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 10th day of the month [[Safar]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 10 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Safar]] [[ar:10 صفر]] [[ckb:١٠ی سەفەر]] [[fa:۱۰ صفر]] [[pnb:10 صفر]] [[sd:10 صفر]] [[ur:10 صفر]]

{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Safar 10''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 10th day of the month [[Safar]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 10 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Safar]] [[ar:10 صفر]] [[ckb:١٠ی سەفەر]] [[fa:۱۰ صفر]] [[pnb:10 صفر]] [[sd:10 صفر]] [[ur:10 صفر]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

{{Islamic Safar}} {{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Safar 10''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 10th day of the month [[Safar]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 10 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Safar]] [[ar:10 صفر]] [[ckb:١٠ی سەفەر]] [[fa:۱۰ صفر]] [[pnb:10 صفر]] [[sd:10 صفر]] [[ur:10 صفر]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Expand Arabic}}↵{{Expand Bengali}}↵{{Expand Persian}}" to ""

bumping these so I can see the more important ones that have not been recently edited

working on the date checking
